results.rendered_html:
ārkṣa (rkṣī f.) [ṛkṣasyedaṃ aṇ] Stellar, regulated by stars or pertaining to them.
— rkṣaḥ A son or descendant of Ṛkṣa.
Comp.
— varṣaḥ a stellar year or revolution of a constellation.
